results.rendered_html:
abhijñu (abhi + jñu = jānu) adv.
1〉 knielings, knieend: saṃjānānā upa sīdannabhijñu  ṚV. 1,72,5 . abhijñavā satvabhirgā anugman 3,39,5 . saparyavo bharamāṇā abhijñu pra vṛñjate namasā bahiragnau 7,2,4 .
— 2〉 bis anʼs Knie: vāśrā abhijñu yātave  ṚV. 1,37,10 . mahā~ abhijñvā yamat 8,81,3 .
